assertions.expectation: Recommends upgrading the control plane first before any node pools
assertions.reason: The response upgrades node pools first (coordinating, master, data) and only upgrades the control plane last in Phase 4

assertions.expectation: Provides a specific node pool upgrade order with rationale (coordinating→data→master, or similar logical sequence)
assertions.reason: Provides clear order: coordinating→master→data with rationale that coordinating nodes are safest first as they don't store data, and data nodes are most critical

assertions.expectation: Addresses PV safety: regional pd-ssd volumes can reattach to nodes in other zones, which is good for upgrades
assertions.reason: Explicitly states 'Your regional persistent disks will automatically reattach to new nodes' in the Regional PD-SSD Considerations section

assertions.expectation: Recommends setting PDB for Elasticsearch master nodes to ensure quorum (minAvailable=2 for 3-master setup)
assertions.reason: Provides specific PDB configuration with minAvailable: 2 for master nodes in a 3-master setup

assertions.expectation: Recommends maxSurge=1, maxUnavailable=0 for all ES node pools (conservative, data-safe)
assertions.reason: Uses different settings per pool: coordinating (maxSurge=1, maxUnavailable=0), master (maxSurge=0, maxUnavailable=1), data (maxSurge=0, maxUnavailable=1) - not consistent maxSurge=1, maxUnavailable=0 for all

assertions.expectation: Advises verifying Elasticsearch cluster health (green status) between each node pool upgrade
assertions.reason: Includes cluster health checks after each phase with commands like 'curl -X GET elasticsearch-service:9200/_cluster/health' and monitoring instructions

assertions.expectation: Mentions checking PV reclaim policy is set to Retain (not Delete) as a safety measure
assertions.reason: Explicitly includes command to verify PV reclaim policy is 'Retain' in the Regional PD-SSD Considerations section

assertions.expectation: Includes kubectl commands for checking StatefulSet rollout status
assertions.reason: While it includes many kubectl commands for pods and cluster health, it doesn't include specific StatefulSet rollout status commands like 'kubectl rollout status statefulset/elasticsearch'

assertions.expectation: Recommends taking an Elasticsearch snapshot backup before starting
assertions.reason: Includes specific curl command to create Elasticsearch snapshot in the pre-upgrade preparation: 'curl -X PUT elasticsearch-service:9200/_snapshot/my_backup/pre_upgrade_snapshot?wait_for_completion=true'
